metadata.name: Analyze and Report on Building Energy Use

description: A sustainability officer requests a report on the energy consumption of all city-owned buildings for the last year.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve historical energy consumption data for all city-owned buildings from their respective BMS.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully queries and aggregates the energy data.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the data to rank the buildings from most to least energy-efficient per square foot.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a ranked list identifying the least efficient buildings.

nodes.task_description: Generate a summary report with visualizations to be sent to the sustainability officer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a comprehensive report with charts and key findings.
